messages.content:
rewrite the text using synonyms. Keep the language clean and simple

By incorporating the best DevOps practices, Innowise Group transformed the client’s software development processes. This transformation enabled the client to enjoy several advantages, including streamlined communication between stakeholders and IT departments, predictable and efficient management of digital solutions, and a faster time-to-market for products. 

Other significant benefits of implementing DevOps in banking included increased efficiency, reduced risk of defects, log generation, quicker product delivery, the ability to roll back quickly if necessary, improved planning, and effective testing and monitoring. 

We improved the customer’s operational metrics for mission-critical systems by increasing availability from 96% to 99.7% and reducing mean time to recovery from 5 hours to 30 minutes while mean time to failure went from days to weeks.

By integrating top DevOps strategies, Innowise Group revolutionized the software development processes of the client. This revolution allowed the client to experience several advantages, such as improved communication between stakeholders and IT departments, efficient and predictable management of digital solutions, and a faster time-to-market for their products.

Other notable benefits of implementing DevOps in the banking sector included enhanced effectiveness, decreased risk of flaws, generation of logs, quicker delivery of products, the capability to quickly revert changes if needed, improved planning, and effective testing and monitoring.

We boosted the customer's metrics for critical systems by increasing availability from 96% to 99.7% and reducing the average time it takes to recover from 5 hours to just 30 minutes, while the average time between failures extended from days to weeks.
rewrite the text using synonyms: 10 times shorter mean time to recovery

This transformation enabled the client to enjoy several advantages, including streamlined communication between stakeholders and IT departments, predictable and efficient management of digital solutions, and a faster time-to-market for products. 

Other significant benefits of implementing DevOps in banking included increased efficiency, reduced risk of defects, log generation, quicker product delivery, the ability to roll back quickly if necessary, improved planning, and effective testing and monitoring. 

We improved the customer’s operational metrics for mission-critical systems by increasing availability from 96% to 99.7% and reducing mean time to recovery from 5 hours to 30 minutes while mean time to failure went from days to weeks.

We configured Jira to manage development processes since it allows for seamless implementation and employment of agile management. Moreover, we decided to use Confluence to create and store documentation previously scattered across multiple corporate documents and files. Finally, we integrated Microsoft Teams to facilitate real-time communication between development teams and external partners by configuring customized plugins and automation features like chats.

We set up Jira to handle development processes as it permits smooth implementation and utilization of agile management. Additionally, we opted to utilize Confluence to generate and store documentation previously dispersed throughout various company documents and files. Lastly, we integrated Microsoft Teams to simplify instant communication among development teams and external collaborators by configuring personalized plugins and automation functionalities such as chats.
rewrite the text using synonyms. Keep the language clean and simple: Choose the software development service that suits you best.
Select the software development solution that fits your needs most effectively.

rewrite the text using synonyms. Keep the language clean and simple

Though our client maintained a wide array of digital banking solutions, they did not have a centralized repository to store code. To ensure streamlined application delivery pipelines and version control, our project team organized training sessions on GitHub usage before transitioning to Bitbucket. Additionally, we deployed Jenkins to facilitate continuous integration and delivery.

Despite our client having various digital banking solutions, they lacked a centralized location to store their code. To ensure smooth application delivery processes and proper version control, our project team conducted training sessions on the usage of GitHub before transitioning to Bitbucket. Moreover, we implemented Jenkins to simplify continuous integration and delivery.

rewrite the text using synonyms. Keep the language clean and simple

Our team implemented TEST IT to perform manual and automated testing and ensure autotest integrations, extended public APIs, test libraries, convenient test script editors, versioning, and historical data management. To eliminate the slightest risk of breaches, we employed Black Duck for compliance with security policies and SonarQube for code quality and cleanliness. These tools allowed our vetted specialists to monitor vulnerabilities in software and maintain hassle-free product quality.

Our team integrated TEST IT to conduct both manual and automated testing, guarantee autotest integrations, expanded public APIs, test libraries, user-friendly test script editors, versioning, and historical data management. To mitigate any potential security breaches, we utilized Black Duck for compliance with security protocols and SonarQube for assessing code quality and cleanliness. These tools enabled our experienced professionals to monitor software vulnerabilities and uphold seamless product quality.

Our team implemented TEST IT to perform manual and automated testing and ensure autotest integrations, extended public APIs, test libraries, convenient test script editors, versioning, and historical data management. To eliminate the slightest risk of breaches, we employed Black Duck for compliance with security policies and SonarQube for code quality and cleanliness. These tools allowed our vetted specialists to monitor vulnerabilities in software and maintain hassle-free product quality.

Our team introduced TEST IT to carry out both manual and automated testing and ensure autotest integrations, expanded public APIs, test libraries, user-friendly test script editors, version control, and historical data management. To eradicate even the smallest possibility of breaches, we utilized Black Duck to adhere to security protocols and SonarQube to assess code quality and cleanliness. These tools enabled our trusted experts to monitor software vulnerabilities and uphold effortless product quality.

rewrite the text using synonyms. Keep the language clean and simple 
Software developers were responsible for writing code and deploying it, but without experienced DevOps engineers, they encountered pitfalls and missed deadlines.
Software developers had the duty of writing code and implementing it, however, lacking skilled DevOps engineers, they faced challenges and failed to meet deadlines.

rewrite the text using synonyms. Keep the language clean and simple

In addition, our specialists ensured deployment automation.

Software developers were responsible for writing code and deploying it, but without experienced DevOps engineers, they encountered pitfalls and missed deadlines. 

We chose Bamboo as a fundamental tool for building, testing, and delivering the software due to its seamless integration with existing infrastructures and a wide range of third-party plugins. 

Moreover, our project team adopted IaC principles to manage deployments, with Terraform for managing cloud environments, Ansible for configuring virtual machines, and Packer for preparing and unifying images. Also, Nexus Repository Pro was deployed in this stream as it can handle massive amounts of product and development data.

Additionally, our experts ensured the automation of deployments.

Software developers were tasked with coding and implementing software, but in the absence of experienced DevOps engineers, they faced obstacles and were unable to meet deadlines.

We selected Bamboo as a core tool for constructing, testing, and delivering software due to its seamless integration with existing systems and extensive range of third-party plugins.

Furthermore, our project team embraced Infrastructure as Code (IaC) principles for managing deployments, utilizing Terraform for overseeing cloud environments, Ansible for configuring virtual machines, and Packer for preparing and unifying images. In addition, we deployed Nexus Repository Pro within this workflow to efficiently handle large volumes of product and development data.

rewrite the text using synonyms. Keep the language clean and simple

Our team prioritized monitoring and analyzing events in the client’s infrastructure. For this, Innowise Group implemented Zabbix to monitor the physical equipment and communication channels and provide visual displays of the infrastructure state. We also integrated the tool with messengers to send alerts and notifications about the current status and progress. To collect, store and analyze log files and product metrics, we used the Logstash, Elasticsearch, and Kibana capabilities. Lastly, we leveraged Grafana and Loki to provide real-time views of developing applications and continuous monitoring of their progress.

Our team emphasized the surveillance and examination of events within the client's infrastructure. To achieve this, Innowise Group introduced Zabbix to oversee the physical hardware and communication channels, presenting visual representations of the infrastructure's condition. Additionally, we integrated the tool with messaging platforms for sending alerts and notifications regarding the current status and progress. To gather, store, and analyze log files and product metrics, we employed the capabilities of Logstash, Elasticsearch, and Kibana. Finally, we utilized Grafana and Loki to offer up-to-date insights into developing applications and ensure constant monitoring of their advancement.

To accomplish this, Innowise Group adopted Zabbix to oversee the physical devices and communication channels, generating visual representations of the infrastructure's condition. Additionally, we integrated the tool with messaging apps to send alerts and notifications regarding the current status and progress. For the collection, storage, and analysis of log files and product metrics, we utilized the capabilities of Logstash, Elasticsearch, and Kibana. Finally, we utilized Grafana and Loki to deliver live perspectives of evolving applications and maintain ongoing monitoring of their advancement.
